title: DockPomo
description: A sleek, lightweight Pomodoro productivity timer that livers right on the Macbook menu bar. Built with Swift and SwiftUI, DockPomo offers a minimalist interface for managing work sessions and breaks, helping users stay focused and productive throughout the day.

title: Stars
description: An immersive, atmospheric audio environment designed to enhance focus and deep work. Explores the texture and layouring of bell-synths to create a rich and etheral soundscape that transports listeners to a serene, cosmic space. Perfect for studying, working, or simply relaxing.
